requests.prompt: A cute round robot character, pixel art style, pastel purple and pink color scheme, soft lighting, cel shading, 16-bit pixel art, sharp edges no anti-aliasing, limited color palette, sprite sheet style. Negative prompt: 3d render, realistic, blurry, extra limbs, asymmetrical eyes, complex background, perspective distortion, dynamic pose, motion blur
